response.original_title: Playboy Video Centerfold: Kimberley Conrad - Playmate of the Year 1989
response.overview: Step into a real life fairy tale staring a bond beauty and the world's most famous playboy bachelor. She's statuesque Alabaman Kimberly Conrad, who came to Playboy by way of Vancouver, Canada to capture the title of 1989 Playmate of the Year and become Hugh Hefner's bride-to-be.
response.title: Playboy Video Centerfold: Kimberley Conrad - Playmate of the Year 1989
